title: Warren Buffett says Iran bomb would make nuclear disaster harder to avoid
summary_full: The Berkshire Hathaway chairman said the growing number of nuclear-armed states has fundamentally altered the global risk landscape.
summary_public: The Berkshire Hathaway chairman said the growing number of nuclear-armed states has fundamentally altered the global risk landscape.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran bomb would make nuclear disaster harder to avoid
